title: The Grand Chronicle of Springtown
content: The Grand Chronicle is a living document maintained by Mei, the traveling storyteller. It connects the lives of all Springtown residents into an interconnected tapestry. The Chronicle records how Sakura's cherry blossoms are connected to the spirits, how Luna reads the same stars that inspire Hiro's inventions, how Kenji's discipline mirrors Yuki's ancient wisdom, and how each resident's story strengthens the others. Mei believes that when all the stories are told together, they reveal a greater truth about Springtown itself.
